message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): refine hot witness index with epoch 0 sentinel and clippy fixes (bd-3t3.9.2)

Fix epoch 0 sentinel bug where newly initialized buckets with epoch_a=0,
epoch_b=0 appeared as "live" when prev_epoch wrapped to 0. Add is_epoch_stale()
helper treating epoch 0 as always stale. Apply clippy pedantic fixes:
needless_range_loop, trivially_copy_pass_by_ref, missing_fields_in_debug.
Remove unused PageNumber import from witness_hierarchy.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
